createdBy.description: The Okta user ID of the user who created the principle rate limit entity

createdDate.description: The date and time the principle rate limit entity was created

defaultConcurrencyPercentage.description: The default percentage of a given concurrency limit threshold that the owning principal can consume

defaultPercentage.description: The default percentage of a given rate limit threshold that the owning principal can consume

id.description: The unique identifier of the principle rate limit entity

lastUpdate.description: The date and time the principle rate limit entity was last updated

lastUpdatedBy.description: The Okta user ID of the user who last updated the principle rate limit entity

orgId.description: The unique identifier of the Okta org

principalId.description: The unique identifier of the principal. This is the ID of the API token or OAuth 2.0 app.

principalType.description: The type of principal, either an API token or an OAuth 2.0 app
